message: Hey, got any plans for the summer?
Hey! Yeah, I'm planning a trip to the mountains with some friends.
That sounds awesome! How long are you going for?
We're thinking of staying for a week. Lots of hiking and maybe some camping.
I've always wanted to do something like that. You'll have to tell me all about it when you get back.
For sure! Maybe we can plan a trip together next time.
I'd love that. Have fun and stay safe!
